hero.tagline: For skiers who do their homework
hero.description: We compare snow, terrain, price and character across {count} resorts worldwide — so you pick the one that actually fits.

mission.intro: Most ski tools show you a list of resorts and hope you figure it out.
mission.description: Snow depth, terrain mix, village vibe, budget, travel time — we score everything so you spend less time researching and more time actually skiing.
